name: Plex Smart Manufacturing Platform API
what_it_does: Plex (Rockwell Automation) Smart Manufacturing Platform REST APIs for cloud-native manufacturing ERP and MES. Enables AI agents to manage production scheduling and work order management for manufacturing execution, handle quality management data including inspection plans, non-conformances, and corrective actions for quality operations, access real-time shop floor data including machine status, OEE, and operator tracking for manufacturing intelligence, retrieve materials management and inventory tracking data for manufacturing supply chain, handle supplier quality management and incoming inspection data for supply chain quality, access customer demand and production planning data for capacity management, retrieve time and attendance data linked to production for labor cost tracking, manage tooling and fixture management data for production resource planning, handle product genealogy and traceability data for product lifecycle tracking, and integrate manufacturing data with ERP, IoT, quality management, and supply chain systems.
use_cases: Monitoring shop floor production from MES automation agents
Managing quality inspections from quality management agents
Tracking inventory from manufacturing supply chain agents
Analyzing OEE from manufacturing analytics agents
not_for: Non-manufacturing businesses without production and quality management needs
Process manufacturing without discrete manufacturing workflow
Non-Plex environments without cloud-native manufacturing ERP
best_when: An automotive supplier, metal fabricator, plastics manufacturer, or food manufacturer using Plex wants AI agents to automate production scheduling, quality inspection management, shop floor monitoring, inventory tracking, and supplier quality management.
avoid_when: SAFETY RISK: Plex manages manufacturing production data with quality and safety implications — automated quality record closure without quality inspector sign-off violates IATF 16949 automotive quality standards. PPAP (Production Part Approval Process) automation requires quality engineer and customer approval. Automated non-conformance disposition without quality review creates product safety and recall risk for automotive and medical device manufacturers.

auth.notes: Plex uses OAuth 2.0 authentication. Developer portal at developer.plex.com. Troy, Michigan HQ. Acquired by Rockwell Automation (2021, $2.2B). Cloud-native manufacturing ERP/MES — unique as SaaS-first manufacturing platform. Strong in automotive, metal fabrication, and food manufacturing. 750+ manufacturers. Rockwell integration for Connected Enterprise strategy. Competes with SAP S/4HANA, Oracle Cloud SCM, and Infor for manufacturing ERP.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per plant and module; Rockwell Automation ecosystem pricing
pricing.notes: Troy, Michigan. Plex Systems founded 2001. Acquired by Rockwell Automation (2021, $2.2B). 750+ manufacturers. Cloud-native MES/ERP — one of few true SaaS manufacturing platforms. Automotive tier 1 and tier 2 suppliers (Ford, GM, Chrysler supply chain). Metal fabrication, plastics, food manufacturing. Rockwell Connected Enterprise integration. Competes with SAP, Oracle Cloud, and Epicor for manufacturing ERP.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; plan dependent

known_agent_gotchas: SAFETY RISK: IATF 16949 automotive quality standards require quality inspector sign-off on inspection records; automated quality record closure without inspection sign-off violates automotive customer quality requirements

PPAP approval workflow — Production Part Approval Process requires quality engineer and automotive customer approval; automated PPAP submission without proper approval chain creates customer quality violation
Rockwell acquisition integration — Plex is now part of Rockwell Automation; integration with Rockwell FactoryTalk and Connected Enterprise is ongoing; verify current integration capability

Automotive customer-specific requirements — automotive tier 1 suppliers have customer-specific requirements (CSR) from Ford, GM, Chrysler; automated quality data must comply with correct customer's requirements

Non-conformance disposition — NC disposition (use-as-is, rework, scrap, return to supplier) requires quality engineer decision; automated NC closure without disposition review creates product safety risk
Cloud-native dependency — Plex is 100% cloud SaaS; internet connectivity is critical for plant operations; offline contingency planning required for production environments
agent_readiness.security_notes: Smart manufacturing platform. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2. US. Manufacturing production, quality, and shop floor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Manufacturing ERP/MES. SOC2. OAuth2. US. Manufacturing production and quality data.
